prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低录取位次分别约为7166名、7592名、9456名、10384名、8141名。2023–2024年连续两年位次明显后移（从7592后移至10384），2025年大幅回升至8141，波动较大，近5年位次均值约8548名，标准差约1300名，显示该校在天津的录取位次存在较大不确定性。2025年基准位次为8141名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为31人，2024年增至34人，2025年增至35人，2026年（据招生计划文件）进一步扩至41人，较2025年增加6人，扩招幅度约17.1%。扩招通常意味着竞争压力相对缓解，位次数字可能有所后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京中医药大学是211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名从2021年第103名持续上升至2026年第63名，排名进步显著，体现了学校综合实力的提升，对考生吸引力有正面作用；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要原因是2025年该校在河北、河南等省份录取位次较2024年下滑超500名，中医学专业在黑龙江、吉林等省份出现断档，最低录取位次跌至二本线附近。此类信号可能对2026年天津考生报考心理产生一定降温效应。抖音热度排名第103，评价为一般，未出现高热关注；该校以中医学、中西医结合、中药学为特色优势学科，在第五轮），中医学专业为国家级一流本科专业，在全国中医药院校中处于领先地位，对有志于中医药事业的考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业整体社会热度持续偏热，临床医学、口腔医学等长期位居专业热度榜前列；中医药相关专业受国家政策支持及健康产业需求驱动，关注度稳步提升。天津市2026年高考报名总人数约82000人，较2025年71938人增加约10062人，增幅约14%，考生规模扩大将加剧整体竞争。天津市本科批；北京中医药大学位于北京市，与天津市相邻，属于京津冀协同发展区域，地域偏好对天津考生有天然吸引力。该。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：2025年基准位次8141名，2026年招生计划扩招约17.1%将推低位次数字（更易进），但天津市考生总数增加约14%将加剧竞争（更难进），两者大致对冲；学校软科排名持续上升增强吸引力（更难进），而2025年多省出现断档的偏负面声誉可能轻微降温（更易进）。经综合权衡，预计2026年录取最低位次在2025年基准上小幅后移，预测最低位次约9008名，波动区间8508–9508名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在9008名附近，区间8508–9508名。位次在区间下限（8508名以内）的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌中医学专业；位次在9000名左右的考生以二档专业为主力选择，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（9508名附近）的考生建议以三档专业保底、二档专业稳妥填报。中医学类（领军人才、卓越班等）录取位次通常在2000–4000名区间，远高于校线，需结合自身位次理性选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Comprehensive category in Tianjin were approximately 7166, 7592, 9456, 10384, and 8141, respectively. In 2023–2024, rankings significantly dropped (from 7592 to 10384), but rebounded sharply to 8141 in 2025, showing high volatility. The average ranking over the past 5 years is about 8548, with a standard deviation of about 1300, indicating considerable uncertainty in admission rankings for this university in Tianjin. The baseline ranking for 2025 is 8141. The enrollment plan for the Comprehensive category in Tianjin was 31 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 34 in 2024, 35 in 2025, and further expanded to 41 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), an increase of 6 students compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 17.1%. Expansion usually means relatively eased competition pressure, potentially pushing the ranking number backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has continuously risen from 103rd in 2021 to 63rd in 2026, showing significant progress in overall strength, which positively attracts candidates. However, the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly because in 2025, the university's admission rankings in provinces like Hebei and Henan dropped by over 500 places compared to 2024, and the Chinese Medicine major experienced gaps in provinces like Heilongjiang and Jilin, with the minimum admission ranking falling near the second-tier line. Such signals may have a cooling effect on the psychology of Tianjin candidates in 2026. Douyin popularity ranking is 103, rated as average, without high attention. The university is known for its distinctive and advantageous disciplines in Chinese Medicine, Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine, and Chinese Materia Medica. In the fifth round, the Chinese Medicine major is a national first-class undergraduate program, leading among Chinese medicine universities nationwide, strongly attracting candidates interested in Chinese medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors overall remain consistently popular, with Clinical Medicine and Stomatology long topping the major popularity charts. Chinese medicine-related majors, driven by national policy support and health industry demand, have steadily increasing attention. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam registrants in Tianjin is about 82,000, an increase of about 10,062 from 71,938 in 2025, an increase of about 14%, which will intensify overall competition. Tianjin undergraduate batch; Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is located in Beijing, adjacent to Tianjin, part of the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei coordinated development region, making it naturally attractive to Tianjin candidates due to regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering all factors: the baseline ranking for 2025 is 8141, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of about 17.1% will push the ranking number backward (easier to enter), but the increase in Tianjin candidates by about 14% will intensify competition (harder to enter), roughly offsetting each other; the university's rising Soft Science ranking enhances attractiveness (harder to enter), while the negative reputation from gaps in multiple provinces in 2025 may slightly cool down (easier to enter). After comprehensive weighing, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 9008, and a fluctuation range of 8508–9508.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 9008, with a range of 8508–9508. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (within 8508) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship Chinese Medicine majors; candidates with rankings around 9000 should mainly choose Tier 2 majors as primary options, while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (around 9508) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options and Tier 2 majors for stable choices. Chinese Medicine categories (Leading Talent, Excellent Class, etc.) typically have admission rankings in the 2000–4000 range, far above the university line, so candidates should choose rationally based on their own rankings.
